title: Towel rack for use during sports event
abstract: Disclosed is a towel rack for use during a tennis or other sports event. In one example, the towel rack includes a support for supporting a towel, and at least one display panel for displaying a message. In a disclosed method, a message is displayed during the sports event, and the towel is placed on the support such that the message is unobstructed by the towel.
claims: Claims 1. A towel rack for use during a sports event, comprising: a disinfector configured to disinfect a towel placed on the towel rack. 2. The towel rack as recited in claim 1, wherein the disinfector includes at least one of UV light, a silver ion infuser, an antimicrobial spray, and antimicrobial textiles. 3. The towel rack as recited in claim 2, wherein the disinfector includes a UV-C light. 4. The towel rack as recited in claim 2, wherein the disinfector is activated when a towel is placed on a towel support of the towel rack. 5. The towel rack as recited in claim 4, further comprising a display panel configured to obscure a view of the towel when the towel is placed on the towel support from at least a front perspective, wherein the display panel is configured to display a sponsor message in a direction of a playing surface of a tennis court. 6. The towel rack as recited in claim 5, wherein the display panel completely obscures both the towel and the disinfector from at least the front perspective. 7. The towel rack as recited in claim 2, further comprising a cooling system configured to cool the towel. 8. The towel rack as recited in claim 7, wherein the cooling system is configured to blow air relative to the towel. 9. The towel rack as recited in claim 7, wherein the towel rack is configured to support a fluid container, and wherein the cooling system is configured to cool the fluid container. 10. The towel rack as recited in claim 1, wherein the towel rack includes a dispenser of hand sanitizer. 11. A towel rack for use during a sports event, comprising: a towel support configured to support a towel placed on the towel support; an antimicrobial solution on or adjacent the towel support. 12. The towel rack as recited in claim 11, wherein the antimicrobial solution includes hand sanitizer gel. 13. The towel rack as recited in claim 11, wherein the antimicrobial solution includes antimicrobial spray. 14. The towel rack as recited in claim 11, further comprising: a display panel extending from a point above the towel support to a point adjacent a ground surface such that, when a towel is placed on the towel support, the display panel obscures a view of a vast majority of the towel from a front perspective. 15. The towel rack as recited in claim 14, wherein a sponsor message is on the display panel and is visible from the front perspective. 16. The towel rack as recited in claim 11, wherein the sports event is a tennis match and the towel rack is located on or adjacent a tennis court. 17. The towel rack as recited in claim 11, wherein the towel rack is configured to support a fluid container configured to hold drinking water. 18. A method, comprising: disinfecting a towel, wherein the disinfecting step is performed during manufacturing of the towel, prior to a tennis match, or during the tennis match; repeatedly placing the towel on a towel rack during the tennis match; and repeatedly removing the towel from the towel rack for use during the tennis match. 19. The method as recited in claim 18, wherein the disinfecting step includes treating the towel by (1) applying silver ions to the towel, (2) infusing the towel with silver ions, or (3) using UV-C light. 20. The method as recited in claim 18, further comprising placing a fluid container configured to hold drinking water on the towel rack.
